items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of a persona scenario involving session token binding to a device/IP. However, there is no evidence provided that directly addresses the expected result of this scenario, nor is there any data or traces captured to support the validation. As a result, the requirement cannot be confirmed or denied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
